docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL DOES 1 TO 5

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78138017), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED DEC-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 MASON STREET, UNIT #807 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78200016)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE (TRANSACTION ID # 78259698) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 78138017) AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, RACHEL
